description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/minutes.md to add an owner (@varun) and a due date (2026-07-10) to the 'fix the Paddle pricing page copy' action item, which had neither. The other two action items already have an owner and a date. check_actions.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_actions.py: 1 action item missing owner and due date — 'Fix the Paddle pricing page copy flagged in the rejection.'. Assigning it to @varun (he owns the Paddle resubmission per the discussion) with a due date of 2026-07-10, ahead of the other dated items. Not touching the checker.

actions.content:
# Meeting Minutes — Growth Weekly Sync

**Date:** 2026-07-06
**Attendees:** Varun, Priya, Sam

## Discussion

Reviewed Paddle resubmission status, newsletter cascade cadence, and the
Loop Engineering course landing page conversion numbers. Agreed the
onboarding email sequence needs a rewrite before the next cohort launch.

## Action Items

- @priya Draft the revised onboarding email sequence by 2026-07-12.
- @varun Fix the Paddle pricing page copy flagged in the rejection by 2026-07-10.
- @sam Pull last week's landing page conversion funnel numbers by 2026-07-08.

interactions.notes: The fix — check_actions.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
